quick_skim.title: Making Locality-aware GEMM Compatible with Page-Granularity Placement on Chiplet GPUs
quick_skim.abstract: Multi-chiplet GPUs scale compute throughput and high-bandwidth memory (HBM) capacity, but their non-uniform memory system makes locality between chiplets and their data critical to the GPU's performance and energy efficiency. Locality-aware scheduling and data placement identify which data should reside near each chiplet. However, in general matrix multiplication (GEMM), locality-aware data placement often becomes incompatible with a fixed page-granularity data interleaving, since the optimal granularity for mapping data across chiplets varies widely across workloads. We propose Chiplet-Contiguous Layout, a global memory layout that stores chiplet-local data contiguously. Chiplet-Contiguous Layout enables locality-aware placement compatible with page-granularity placement across diverse large language model (LLM) GEMM shapes, without changes to the operating system or hardware. On representative LLM inference and training GEMMs from Qwen 3 30B and Llama 3.1 70B, Chiplet-Contiguous Layout on average reduces remote HBM traffic by 13.0x on Qwen and 20.7x on Llama over 4\,KB interleaving, and by 3.3x and 3.7x over coarse locality-aware placement.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: locality-aware data placement for near-memory computing on chiplet GPUs
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 多芯片GPU上面向近内存计算的局部感知数据放置
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 多芯片GPU上面向近内存计算的局部感知数据放置
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 多芯片GPU上面向近内存计算的局部感知数据放置
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Chiplet-Contiguous Layout to enable locality-aware data placement compatible with page granularity for multi-chiplet GPUs, improving performance and energy efficiency in near-memory computing contexts.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 多芯片GPU因非一致内存架构导致数据局部性成为性能与能效的关键，但固定页粒度数据交织与局部感知放置策略不兼容。本文提出芯片连续布局(Chiplet-Contiguous Layout)这一全局内存布局，将每个芯片的本地数据连续存储，使得局部感知放置与页粒度兼容，在GEMM基准测试中显著提升性能并降低能耗，为多芯片系统的近内存计算提供了有效的数据管理方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 多芯片GPU因非一致内存架构导致数据局部性成为性能与能效的关键，但固定页粒度数据交织与局部感知放置策略不兼容。本文提出芯片连续布局(Chiplet-Contiguous Layout)这一全局内存布局，将每个芯片的本地数据连续存储，使得局部感知放置与页粒度兼容，在GEMM基准测试中显著提升性能并降低能耗，为多芯片系统的近内存计算提供了有效的数据管理方案。

quick_skim.title: Interface-engineered oxidation-resistant wafer-level Tantalum-Tantalum thermocompression bonding for 3D integration of superconducting interconnects
quick_skim.abstract: Wafer-level 3D integration of superconducting interconnects requires low-thermal budget bonding processes compatible with superconducting materials. Rapid native oxide formation on tantalum (Ta) surfaces limits low-temperature, low-pressure direct Ta-Ta thermocompression bonding. In this study, we develop an oxidation-resistant bonding process using an ultrathin Au passivation layer to suppress oxide formation during bonding. The engineered interface enables blanket Ta-Ta wafer bonding at 300 $^\circ$C under 4.93 bar, significantly reducing the bonding thermal budget and generation of $α$-Ta across the interface, which potentially improves coherence time as reported in literature. Structural and interfacial analyses confirm oxide suppression and continuous metallic bonding, having a bond strength of 169 MPa. This work demonstrates a low-temperature, low-pressure Ta-Ta thermocompression bonding strategy for scalable 3D superconducting interconnect integration.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: wafer-level Ta-Ta thermocompression bonding for 3D integration
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 晶圆级钽-钽热压键合用于三维集成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 晶圆级钽-钽热压键合用于三维集成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 晶圆级钽-钽热压键合用于三维集成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper develops an oxidation-resistant wafer-level Ta-Ta thermocompression bonding process using an ultrathin Au passivation layer, enabling 3D integration of superconducting interconnects at 300C and 4.93 bar.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对超导互连三维集成中低温键合的需求，本文提出一种界面工程方法，利用超薄金钝化层抑制钽表面氧化，实现晶圆级钽-钽热压键合。在300°C和4.93 bar条件下成功实现键合，降低了热预算并减少了α-Ta生成。该技术为三维集成电路中超导互连的集成提供了可行的键合方案，对近存计算系统的3D堆叠具有潜在价值。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对超导互连三维集成中低温键合的需求，本文提出一种界面工程方法，利用超薄金钝化层抑制钽表面氧化，实现晶圆级钽-钽热压键合。在300°C和4.93 bar条件下成功实现键合，降低了热预算并减少了α-Ta生成。该技术为三维集成电路中超导互连的集成提供了可行的键合方案，对近存计算系统的3D堆叠具有潜在价值。
